nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.comment: Accepts JSON: { text, voice_preset (optional), output_format (optional), channel (optional, defaults to #general) }

nodes.name: Bark API Call
nodes.comment: Requires BARK_HOST and BARK_EXTERNAL_PORT environment variables. Defaults to localhost:9200 if not set.

nodes.name: Merge
nodes.comment: Combines Bark API response (Input 1) with Store Input (Input 2)

parameters.text:
={{ '*Bark TTS Complete*

**Format:** ' + ($json.format || 'unknown') + '
**Sample Rate:** ' + ($json.sample_rate || 0) + ' Hz
**Audio Size:** ' + Math.round(($json.audio_size_bytes || 0) / 1024) + ' KB**

✅ Generation successful!' }}

nodes.name: Discord Output
nodes.comment: Sends success notification to the channel specified in the webhook input (or #general if not provided)

parameters.text:
={{ '*Bark TTS Failed*

**Error:** ' + ($json.message || $json.error || $json.description || (typeof $json === 'string' ? $json.substring(0, 200) : 'Unknown error')) + '
**Status:** ' + ($json.statusCode || $json.code || 'N/A') + '

Please check the Bark service and try again.' }}

nodes.name: Discord Error
nodes.comment: Sends error notification to the channel specified in the webhook input. Uses $('Webhook Trigger') to access original input since error flow receives error object from failing node, not the original payload.
